scripts.build:mobile: node mobile-config/increment-version.js && node mobile-config/update-version-in-files.js && cross-env BUILD_MODE=mobile NEXT_PUBLIC_ENV=prod APP_CHANNEL=prod node scripts/switch-next-config.js mobile && npm run prebuild && next build && npm run postbuild && npx cap copy android && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:mobile:noinc: node mobile-config/update-version-in-files.js && cross-env BUILD_MODE=mobile NEXT_PUBLIC_ENV=prod APP_CHANNEL=prod node scripts/switch-next-config.js mobile && npm run prebuild && next build && npm run postbuild && npx cap copy android && npx cap sync android
